Shore Thing Transportation

Asbury Park's premium black car service — professional, punctual, and locally trusted.

About Us

Shore Thing Transportation is Monmouth County's trusted luxury black car service, specializing in airport transfers, corporate transportation, wedding and event rides, and on-demand chauffeur service across the Jersey Shore.

Our fleet includes Cadillac Escalades, Chevy Suburbans, and executive sedans — all late-model, fully insured, and maintained to the highest standards.

Serving Asbury Park, Belmar, Red Bank, Long Branch & all of Monmouth County
